inputs.label: Fuel Type
inputs.businessContext: Fuel type determines energy density and cost per unit. Based on standard fuel classifications (ASTM D975 for diesel, ASTM D4814 for gasoline).

inputs.label: Fuel Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Average fuel consumption per 100 km. For electric vehicles, use kWh/100km. Based on EPA fuel economy testing procedures.

inputs.label: Distance Traveled
inputs.businessContext: Total distance traveled in the period. Used to calculate total fuel used.

inputs.label: Fuel Price per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Current market price per liter or kWh. Source: local fuel price indices.

inputs.label: Currency
inputs.businessContext: Currency for cost output. ISO 4217 currency codes.

inputs.label: Period
inputs.businessContext: Time period for cost calculation. Used to scale distance if needed (e.g., monthly distance).

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Confidence in input data accuracy. Affects adjusted output. Based on data quality assessment (ISO 8000).

rules: if fuelType == 'electricity' then fuelConsumption unit is kWh/100km

suggestedActions: fuelConsumption > 20 ? 'Consider vehicle maintenance or driving behavior improvement' : ''
fuelPrice > 2 ? 'Explore alternative fuel sources or bulk purchasing' : ''
